ACC.summary: The ACC is a Power Four league that carries 9.97% of national title equity across 1000 simulations. Members fill 11.79% of all playoff field slots — a meaningful slice of the 12-team bracket. Miami Hurricanes is a heavy favorite at 32.0% conference title odds. The next tier includes SMU Mustangs (13.1%), Louisville Cardinals (11.8%), Clemson Tigers (7.8%). Miami Hurricanes averages 9.53 wins and reaches the playoff field in 49.6% of simulations. Miami Hurricanes is the league's top national title threat at 5.04% championship odds, and the top three teams hold 73.2% of the conference's title equity. 3 programs carry at least 1% national title equity, led by Miami Hurricanes (5.0%), Louisville Cardinals (1.2%), SMU Mustangs (1.1%). Schedules are demanding: member teams average +0.6 strength of schedule in the model. Stanford Cardinal brings up the rear at 4.39 average wins.
